title: Monsoon Zesty Thai Turkey Ham Clay-Pot-Cook
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired clay pot dish, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the clay pot over medium heat and add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and curry paste. Whisk until smooth.
Add the sliced turkey ham and cook until lightly browned.
Add the Thai red peppers, onion, and garlic. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot over a bed of fluffy rice.
Garnish with additional Thai basil leaves, if desired.
Transfer the clay pot to the oven and bake at 3758 for 20 minutes.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
